entries.title: Attention save-for-backward contract broken by flash forward path

detected_by.first_signal: Step-1 slot parity mismatch in v_proj activations.

entries.root_cause: Generated runtime called flash attention forward while backward consumed saved attn_weights tensors. Flash forward does not materialize softmax weights.

fix.summary: Codegen now emits exact attention forward when save_for_backward.attn_weights is required, and keeps flash only when weights are not needed by backward.

entries.title: Grad-activation buffers persisted across micro-steps when grad_accum > 1

detected_by.first_signal: Runtime parity failed for grad_accum=2/4/8 on stress flow.

entries.root_cause: Generated ck_train_step only cleared grads at accumulation-window start. grad_activations must reset every micro-step, not once per window.

fix.summary: Codegen now emits separate ck_zero_grad_weights and ck_zero_grad_activations calls. Mid-window clears activations only.

metrics: Before fix: first fail steps around 72/184/408 for ga=2/4/8
After fix: fail_count=0 for ga=2/4/8 stress checks

entries.title: Train/parity path ignored run-dir manifest dims and used tiny defaults

detected_by.first_signal: Apples-to-oranges parity drift from dimension mismatch against run-dir manifest.

entries.root_cause: ck_run_v7.py train used tiny defaults (vocab/d_model/hidden/layers) unless manually overridden, even with --run pointing to an initialized manifest.

fix.summary: Resolve effective train dimensions from run_dir/weights_manifest.json and propagate to both CK runtime and oracle paths. Emit train_dims in output JSON.

metrics: Post-fix runs report effective dimensions from manifest via train_dims metadata

entries.title: Cross-entropy semantic and numeric mismatch created long-horizon drift

detected_by.first_signal: Stress parity failed around step ~64/~117 in older full-C harness runs.

entries.root_cause: Loss reduction/ignore-index semantics and numeric path were not fully aligned with PyTorch reference behavior.

fix.summary: Adopt stable log-sum-exp loss path and PyTorch-aligned index-target mean semantics. Preserve strict CE reference variant for diagnostics.

metrics: Updated 850-step parity evidence now passes for c, c_ptref, and torch loss backends

entries.title: Optimizer-state divergence could hide behind weight-only replay checks

detected_by.first_signal: Need to distinguish weight parity from optimizer-state parity in runtime replay triage.

entries.root_cause: Replay checks lacked explicit optimizer-state snapshot export/import/compare in earlier flows.

fix.summary: Add runtime optimizer-state snapshot APIs and replay comparison fields, plus persisted optimizer-state snapshot artifacts.

metrics: Runtime parity output includes optimizer_state diff/error fields
